summary: Fine Art & Specie insurance covering high-value artworks, antiques, jewellery, and other specie items for private collectors, galleries, museums, and dealers. Specialist agreed value policies with transit, exhibition, and storage coverage.

schemaEntities.description: Individual art item entity. Custom: ArtistName, Title, Medium, YearCreated, ProvenanceVerified, AgreedValue, LastValuationDate, ValuerName, AuthenticationCert, ConservationStatus, ExportLicenceRequired.

71 rules: agreed value adequacy check vs market index, provenance verification requirement above £50k, export licence trigger for non-UK items, valuation currency limits, transit packing standard requirements.

relationships.note: Agreed value per item -- 11 custom item fields drive coverage terms
Provenance and valuation currency rules reference individual item fields

migrationIssues.detail: ArtItem_Art has 11 custom fields. No GW Cloud standard art/specie item entity -- new entity design required for itemised art schedule.
Agreed value adequacy checked against art market indices (Mei Moses, Artprice). No GW Cloud native art market data integration.
Provenance verification requirement above threshold. Custom Gosu rule -- GW Cloud underwriting rules can support with configuration.
Temporary transit and exhibition period cover activation. GW Cloud endorsement model supports -- configuration work required.

cloudMapping.action: Generic provenance field -- verification threshold rule requires migration
Direct mapping -- GW Cloud specie agreed value native field
Mei Moses / Artprice market index integration required
